revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Disambiguation pages]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24608848913|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:隼神社]]
'''Hayabusa Shrine''' (隼神社)
* {{ill|Nagi Shrine (Kyoto)|lt=Hayabusa Shrine (Kyoto)|ja|隼神社 (京都市)|1=Nagi_Shrine_(Kyoto)#Hayabusa_Shrine|2=ja|lt_ja=隼神社 (京都市)|3=梛神社|lt=Hayabusa Shrine (Kyoto)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hayabusa Shrine (Kyoto)|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Nakagyō-ku, Kyoto|en|Nakagyō-ku, Kyoto|qid=Q1075455|lt=Nakagyō-ku, Kyoto|1=Nakagyō-ku, Kyoto}}, {{ill|Kyoto Prefecture|en|Kyoto Prefecture|qid=Q120730|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|1=Kyoto Prefecture}}, within the grounds of {{ill|Nagi Shrine (Kyoto)|ja|梛神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagi Shrine (Kyoto)|qq=}}. It is a {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}. * {{ill|Hayabusa Shrine (Nara)|ja|隼神社 (奈良市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hayabusa Shrine (Nara)|qq=}} - Situated in {{ill|Nara (city)|en|Nara (city)|qid=Q169134|lt=Nara City|1=Nara (city)}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|en|Nara Prefecture|qid=Q131287|lt=Nara Prefecture|1=Nara Prefecture}}.
{{disambiguation}}
{{translated page|ja|隼神社|version=66993662|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[ja:隼神社]]
